name: ᚠ Fehu
summary: Wealth, nourishment, movable resources, life-force in motion
flowText: Fehu is wealth as movement — the warm herd that thrives when shared.

overview.label: Essence
overview.value: Wealth, nourishment, movable resources, life-force in motion

overview.label: Tarot
overview.value: III The Empress · X Wheel of Fortune

items.label: Essence
items.value: Wealth, nourishment, movable resources, life-force in motion

items.label: Tarot
items.value: III The Empress · X Wheel of Fortune

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: ♐ Sagittarius
related.teaser: Sagittarius is the bow of the sky — fire of vision, wanderer’s path, eye of the eagle.

related.name: ♀ Venus
related.teaser: Venus is the rose of harmony — magnetic union, pulse of beauty, lover’s path.

related.name: ♃ Jupiter
related.teaser: Jupiter is the thunder scepter — wheel of fate, king of sky, expansion of spirit.

related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.

related.name: ᚾ Nauthiz
related.teaser: Nauthiz is the narrow pass — the wise pressure that forges character.

related.name: IV. The Emperor
related.teaser: The Emperor is the throne of flame — law of fire seated on the bones of the earth.

related.name: Freyr
related.teaser: Freyr embodies fertility, love, prosperity — under Venus; in Taurus.

related.name: Freyja
related.teaser: Freyja embodies fertility, love, prosperity — under Venus; in Taurus.

related.name: ᛝ Ingwaz
related.teaser: Ingwaz is the sleeping sun — the seed that remembers summer.
